title: Neutralization Proxy Specialist
summary: F1 strategy sources note that Safety Car/VSC periods materially reduce pit-loss and shift optimal stop timing.
rationale: F1 strategy sources note that Safety Car/VSC periods materially reduce pit-loss and shift optimal stop timing. Your table lacks an explicit flag-state column, so there may be hidden signal in simultaneous field-wide lap-time inflation/compression that the current global model treats as noise.
implementation_hint: Build race-lap regime features such as race-lap median `LapTime_Delta`, IQR/std of `LapTime_Delta`, fraction of drivers with large positive delta, and driver delta minus race-lap median. Train a small specialist model only on rows flagged as likely neutralized or near-neutralized, then blend with the base model using the proxy score as a gate.
expected_effect: Better recall on opportunistic pit calls under SC/VSC-like conditions and less dilution of dry green-flag patterns.
risk: Proxy labels for neutralization will be noisy; if the detector is crude it can overfit unusual slow laps or wet conditions.
